problem id: aeca38ba
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01001000 -> 10010000
  10110001 -> 01100011
  01100111 -> 01001110
  01001011 -> 00010110
  10111001 -> 01110011
  00011100 -> 00111000
  01111000 -> 11110000
  01110111 -> 01101110

query: 10111101
predicted answer: 01111011
